tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def incidents (pagerduty_incidents))
(def high-triggered (filter (fn [i] (and (= (:urgency i) "high") (= (:status i) "triggered"))) incidents))
(def count-high-triggered (count high-triggered))
{:count count-high-triggered :ids (map :id high-triggered)}"}
